channel.title: Road Bikes on Mizubikes
channel.description: Recent content in Road Bikes on Mizubikes

item.title: Specialized Tarmac SL9 Is Official: Here's What Actually Changed
item.description: Specialized has officially launched the S-Works Tarmac SL9, calling it the fastest road bike it's ever made. Here's what's real, what's marketing, and how it stacks up against the SL8.

item.title: Specialized Tarmac SL9: What the Leaks Actually Show
item.description: Leaked images and video of the Specialized Tarmac SL9 have been spreading since May. Here's what the spy shots actually tell us — and what they don't.

item.title: Crux 5 vs Road Bike: Is the Quiver Killer Finally Here?
item.description: The Crux 5 weighs 789g, clears 55mm tires, and borrows aero shaping from the Tarmac SL8. Here's the honest case for replacing your road bike with one.

item.title: Canyon Endurace CFR 2026 Review: Should You Buy It?
item.description: The new Canyon Endurace CFR just launched with Aeroad geometry, Aeroad looks, and 35mm tire clearance. We break down who it's actually for and whether it's worth $10,499.

item.title: Factor Ostro VAM V2 Build
item.description: A full custom build of the Factor Ostro VAM V2 — lightweight aero road bike with Shimano Di2, Quarq power meter, BTLos wheels, and a custom 3D printed headset spacer.
